title: IP6 0JB, Sackers Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/LP3494NX/V008
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Sackers Limited Installation name: Sacker’s Metal Recycling Facility Permit number: EPR/LP3494NX/V008  "
